description:
Made from high-grade 210T parachute nylon fabric materials, our hammock is skin-friendly, breathable, smooth, thin, lightweight, tear-proof and sturdy and can bear approx. 600lbs-weight objects. It can be set up easily with the coming well-equipped accessories (two heavy-duty iron steel carabiners, two sturdy nylon ropes and two tough tree straps) when you want to take a break and relax yourself. Additionally, designing an integrated storage bag to pack our 102in-length and 55in-width (unfolding size) hammock to a small size (9.06in-length, 7.09in-width and 4.33in-height) for a simple and convenient storage after use.

Feature：

600LBS LOAD-BEARING PARACHUTE HAMMOCK: Adopting high-grade 210T parachute nylon fabric materials, our hammock is skin-friendly, breathable, smooth, thin, lightweight, tear-proof and sturdy and can bear approx. 600lbs-weight objects.

CONSIDERATE MOSQUITO PREVENTION NET: Owning a dense and sturdy nylon net with double-sided zippers to protect you from the bites and stings of mosquitoes or other insects. Freely relax yourself on our hammock without any unwanted disturbance.

EASY TO SETUP: Coming with two heavy-duty iron steel carabiners, two sturdy nylon ropes and two tough nylon straps for easy assembly. It owns dense and sturdy nylon mosquito net to protect you from the bites and stings s of mosquitoes or other insects especially.

CONVENIENT TO STORE: At the edge of our hammock is designed a storage bag to pack it (102in-length and 55in-width unfolding size) to a small size (9.06in-length, 7.09in-width and 4.33in-height) for convenient storage.

WIDE USE OCCASIONS: Suitable for most outdoor occasions such as hiking, backpacking, camping, travel, beach, backyard, garden, etc. and it comes with 4 different colors (camouflage, army green, dark blue and light blue, and gray and blue for your selection, a great gift for yourself, your family members and friends.

Specification：

Product Type: Camping Hammock

Material: 210T Parachute Nylon Fabric

Load Bearing Capacity: Approx.600lbs

Item Color: Camouflage

Item Size:

Unfolding Size: 260cm x 140cm/102in x 55in (L x W)

Folding Size: 23cm x 18cm x 11cm/9.06in x 7.09in x 4.33in (L x W x H)

Item Weight: 753g/1.66lbs

Package size: 25*19*9cm/9.84*7.48*3.54in

Package weight: 807g/1.78lbs

Package Contents：


1 x Hammock
2 x Ropes
2 x Straps
2 x Carabiners
1 x User Manual
